description: Canonical FAQ roster with explicit IDs. Extracted from lane-archetypes.js. Each FAQ has a stable ID used for bundle logging, weight tracking, and experiment comparison. IDs are immutable once assigned.

universal_faqs.description: FAQs generated by lane-factory.js FAQ_TEMPLATES, shared across all archetypes

notes: IDs are immutable once assigned. New FAQs get new IDs. Retired FAQs keep their IDs but get weight 0.3 via learning system.
